Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
The Ritz
Raleigh, NC
Seating Capacity: 1200
Venue Type : Bar/Club

Total Gigs: 4
  DMB  (3)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
09.29.94 - Jimi Thing (10:36)
Venue Picture
Description
The Ritz was located at 2820 Industrial Drive in Raleigh, NC. The following is a review of the venue by a fan: "The Ritz is a square 'theater' (I would not call it one) with a balcony that forms a U around the upstairs. The floor has no chairs but adequate visibility, and the acoustics are decent at best. There are 2 or 3 bars in there, and it's not a bad place to see a show, although they do not allow smoking inside the venue, nor do they allow anyone to walk outside and re-enter." After being closed for a time, the venue has since been revitalized and reopened.
